# PersonaLens — Free 16 Personalities Test & Type Guides

> PersonaLens is a free online personality test platform. Users can take a 60-question personality assessment and receive one of 16 personality types. The site provides in-depth guides for each type including strengths, weaknesses, career advice, and compatibility analysis.

## Available Resources

- [Home](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/): Main page with test overview and all 16 personality types
- [16 Personalities Test](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/tests/16-personalities/): Free 60-question personality test
- [INTJ Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/intj/): The Architect personality type
- [INTP Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/intp/): The Logician personality type
- [ENTJ Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/entj/): The Commander personality type
- [ENTP Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/entp/): The Debater personality type
- [INFJ Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/infj/): The Advocate personality type
- [INFP Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/infp/): The Mediator personality type
- [ENFJ Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/enfj/): The Protagonist personality type
- [ENFP Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/enfp/): The Campaigner personality type
- [ISTJ Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/istj/): The Logistician personality type
- [ISFJ Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/isfj/): The Defender personality type
- [ESTJ Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/estj/): The Executive personality type
- [ESFJ Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/esfj/): The Consul personality type
- [ISTP Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/istp/): The Virtuoso personality type
- [ISFP Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/isfp/): The Adventurer personality type
- [ESTP Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/estp/): The Entrepreneur personality type
- [ESFP Profile](https://persona-quiz-ecru.vercel.app/personality/esfp/): The Entertainer personality type
